title: Wolf's Enhanced Vanilla
description:
performance and immersion, also includes world gen mods for exploration, the only new items are from the adventurers backpack mod and create. (=

P.S. Also this pack works with Vivecraft, just disable first person model first
body:
This modpack is primarily for me and my friends, though others are free to use it, the only new items come from the Adventurers backpack mod and create, other than that its all vanilla blocks, there is enhanced world gen for exploration, and plenty of optimisations. there is also combat roll, and simple combat to improve the feel of combat.

This pack has both Distant horizons and Voxy, by default voxy is disabled, if youd like to use it then disable distant horizons first.

This pack can get 60+ fps on a Ryzen 3 2200g with vega 8, and 16gb ram, when using one of the lighter shaders

all screenshots were taken with the Mellow shader and the Vanilla Mashup Resourcepack
Mellow Shader -
https://modrinth.com/shader/mellow

Vanilla Mashup -
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-mashup-pbr
